name: New Dexterity Coaxial Benchmarking Platform
note: Open hardware/test platform reference; numbers come from the project README.

name: Hackaday/New Dexterity spacing sweep
note: Result log reports seven z/D spacings from 0.1 to 1.0 and a 10x10 actuation map per spacing.

name: 11in local efficiency maxima region 1
note: Qualitative region from the public result log; use as a spacing-region anchor, not digitized curve data.

name: 11in local efficiency minimum
note: Qualitative region from the public result log.

name: 11in local efficiency maxima region 2
note: The current coaxialX8 z/D=0.72 lands in this qualitative region.

name: coaxial allocation efficiency gain
note: Public abstract/preview reports up to 11% mechanical-efficiency improvement from the allocation method; treat as a high-level claim until the full curve is digitized.
